mapper.select: SELECT l.*, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, s.class_name, cu.real_name as counselor_name, a.real_name as approver_name FROM leave_request l LEFT JOIN student s ON l.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user cu ON s.counselor_id = cu.id LEFT JOIN user a ON l.approver_id = a.id WHERE l.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY l.created_at DESC

SELECT l.*, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, s.class_name, cu.real_name as counselor_name, a.real_name as approver_name FROM leave_request l LEFT JOIN student s ON l.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user cu ON s.counselor_id = cu.id LEFT JOIN user a ON l.approver_id = a.id WHERE s.counselor_id = #{counselorId} ORDER BY l.created_at DESC

SELECT l.*, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, s.class_name, cu.real_name as counselor_name, a.real_name as approver_name FROM leave_request l LEFT JOIN student s ON l.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user cu ON s.counselor_id = cu.id LEFT JOIN user a ON l.approver_id = a.id LEFT JOIN assignment ast ON s.id = ast.student_id LEFT JOIN room r ON ast.room_id = r.id WHERE r.building_id = #{buildingId} AND ast.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY l.created_at DESC

SELECT l.*, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, s.class_name, cu.real_name as counselor_name, a.real_name as approver_name FROM leave_request l LEFT JOIN student s ON l.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user cu ON s.counselor_id = cu.id LEFT JOIN user a ON l.approver_id = a.id ORDER BY l.created_at DESC

SELECT l.*, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, s.class_name, cu.real_name as counselor_name, a.real_name as approver_name FROM leave_request l LEFT JOIN student s ON l.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user cu ON s.counselor_id = cu.id LEFT JOIN user a ON l.approver_id = a.id WHERE l.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leave_request (student_id, start_time, end_time, reason, type, status, created_at) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{reason}, #{type}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT l.*, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, s.class_name, cu.real_name as counselor_name, a.real_name as approver_name FROM leave_request l LEFT JOIN student s ON l.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user cu ON s.counselor_id = cu.id LEFT JOIN user a ON l.approver_id = a.id WHERE l.student_id = #{studentId} AND l.status = #{status} ORDER BY l.created_at DESC

SELECT l.*, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, s.class_name, cu.real_name as counselor_name, a.real_name as approver_name FROM leave_request l LEFT JOIN student s ON l.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user cu ON s.counselor_id = cu.id LEFT JOIN user a ON l.approver_id = a.id WHERE s.counselor_id = #{counselorId} AND l.status = #{status} ORDER BY l.created_at DESC
